rationale: The previous attempt nested all asserts inside `if H1 && H2 { ... }`, so the unfolded conjuncts of `next_ensures` were discarded by the time the postcondition was checked. This attempt lifts them to unconditional top-level implications `next_ensures(...) ==> conjunct_i`, each a tautology by inlining the open spec body, so z3 sees them symmetrically across r1/r2 while verifying the postcondition. Also unfolds `event_seq` and `det_real_next_impl_equal` so the components of the equality are named, giving z3 explicit matching terms for the closed `view` calls.
